name: open5gs
description: Open5GS 5G Core network deployed on Kubernetes via openverso-charts
context_prompt:
Open5GS is a 5G Core network running on Kubernetes with the following NFs:
AMF, AUSF, BSF, NRF, NSSF, PCF, SMF, UDM, UDR, UPF, WebUI.
UERANSIM provides the gNB and UE simulators.
All NFs communicate via SBI (Service-Based Interface) on port 7777.

1.description: A fault has been injected into the Open5GS 5G Core deployment in the '{namespace}' namespace. UEs can register but PDU session establishment is failing. Diagnose the root cause and provide remediation steps.

2.description: A fault has been injected into the Open5GS 5G Core deployment in the '{namespace}' namespace. One of the NF pods is in CrashLoopBackOff. Diagnose the root cause and provide remediation steps.

3.description: A fault has been injected into the Open5GS 5G Core deployment in the '{namespace}' namespace. The user plane is not functioning — PDU sessions cannot be established. Diagnose the root cause and provide remediation steps.
